# Research: Fix Media Preview Text

## Decision: Strip image syntax from preview text

**Rationale**: Blog cards are summaries of written content. Image alt text generated by the editor can be generic (`Image`) or metadata-like (`1.00`), so preserving it creates misleading excerpts.

**Alternatives considered**:

- Keep image alt text unless it matches known bad values. Rejected because the bad values are editor-dependent and would require an incomplete denylist.
- Fix each card component separately. Rejected because preview generation is shared and the root cause is upstream.

## Decision: Preserve link labels

**Rationale**: Link labels are part of readable prose and should remain in summaries.

**Alternatives considered**:

- Strip all markdown links. Rejected because it would remove meaningful text from excerpts.

## Decision: Keep cover extraction unchanged

**Rationale**: The image can still be useful as card media even when its alt text is not useful as summary copy.

**Alternatives considered**:

- Change card cover extraction together with excerpt extraction. Rejected because the bug is only about leaked text.
